title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python library that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, embed, pull and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official npm package providing browser & Node.js clients for the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama models as LLM and embeddings providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG uploads.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama supporting streaming, embeddings and custom options.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem exposing chat, pull and generate endpoints.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat tool written in Go that supports conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into inline GitHub Copilot-style suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes showing how to run Ollama on Raspberry Pi, Kubernetes, with GPU offload, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with PVC, autoscaling and GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama server with WebUI, Open WebUI and RAG extras.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that reproducibly builds Ollama and common models for macOS and Linux.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate providing typed wrappers for chat, embeddings and model management endpoints.
